patterns.name: Full OTA Update for Infotainment ECU
patterns.description: Complete firmware update for infotainment system using A/B partitioning
patterns.use_case: Major version upgrade of infotainment software with new UI features
best_practices: Always verify battery level before starting update
Use A/B partitioning for safe rollback
Implement progressive download with resume capability
Run full diagnostic suite after installation
Monitor vehicle state throughout update process
common_issues: Network interruption during download - implement chunked transfer with retry
Insufficient disk space - clean temp files before update
Boot verification failure - automatic rollback to partition A
Battery drain during installation - warn user to connect charger
patterns.rollback_procedure: If boot verification fails, bootloader automatically switches to partition A. Manual rollback via diagnostic port available for 72 hours.

patterns.name: Delta OTA Update for ADAS ECU
patterns.description: Incremental update for ADAS camera calibration and detection algorithms
patterns.use_case: Patch update for improved object detection without full reflash
best_practices: Verify base version before applying delta
Require higher battery threshold for safety-critical ECUs
Run comprehensive ADAS diagnostics after update
Implement atomic update to prevent partial application
Log all safety-related events during update
common_issues: Delta patch corruption - verify checksum before and after application
Camera calibration drift - run auto-calibration post-update
CAN bus timeout during reboot - implement watchdog with extended timeout
Version mismatch - strict base version validation required
Safety diagnostic failure - automatic rollback mandatory
validation_rules: signature must use RSA4096 or higher for ASIL-B
safety_diagnostics must pass before and after update
patterns.rollback_procedure: ASIL-B requires automatic rollback if any safety diagnostic fails. Rollback is triggered within 100ms of detection. Previous version restored from backup partition. Vehicle enters limp mode until manual inspection.

patterns.name: Dual-Bank OTA Update for Powertrain ECU
patterns.description: Safety-critical powertrain update using dual-bank flash memory
patterns.use_case: Engine control unit firmware update for emissions compliance
best_practices: Ensure engine is off and cooled
Use dual-bank flash for atomic updates
Keep backup bank intact for 30 days
common_issues: Flash write failure - automatically retry on backup bank
DTC codes present - abort update until cleared
Emissions test failure - automatic rollback mandatory
Bank switch failure - fallback to backup bank immediately
Watchdog timeout during flash - extended timeout for ASIL-D
validation_rules: ignition must be off during entire update
no_dtc_codes must be true before starting
signature must use ECDSA_P384 or higher for ASIL-D
encryption must be AES256 minimum for powertrain
patterns.rollback_procedure: ASIL-D requires immediate automatic rollback if any safety check fails. System switches back to backup bank within 50ms. Vehicle enters fail-safe mode with reduced power. OBD-II code logged. Manual technician inspection required before retry.
verification_steps: Write to inactive bank with verification
Post-install: Verify boot from new bank

patterns.name: Cloud-Connected Telematics OTA
patterns.description: Over-the-air update for telematics control unit with cloud sync
patterns.use_case: Update telematics for new connected services and security patches
best_practices: Use progressive download with resume capability
Verify each chunk before writing to disk
Sync with cloud after successful update
Implement bandwidth throttling to avoid data overage
common_issues: 5G connection drop - implement resume from last chunk
Cloud API timeout - retry with exponential backoff
GPS signal loss after update - run GPS cold start
Disk space exhaustion - clean old logs before download
validation_rules: cloud_connectivity must be verified before download
patterns.rollback_procedure: If cloud sync fails after update, keep local version but flag for manual review. GPS failure triggers automatic rollback. User can manually rollback via settings for 7 days.
verification_steps: Download update from cloud with chunk verification

patterns.name: Infotainment Firmware Update - US Market
patterns.description: Standard infotainment system firmware update for US region
patterns.use_case: Standard infotainment system firmware update for US region
best_practices: Use A/B partitioning for safe updates
common_issues: Network interruption during download - implement chunked transfer with retry
Insufficient disk space - clean temp files before update
Boot verification failure - automatic rollback to previous partition
patterns.rollback_procedure: Automatic rollback enabled on failure. Previous version restored from backup partition within specified timeout.
verification_steps: Write to inactive partition/bank with verification

patterns.name: ADAS Camera Firmware Update - ASIL-B
patterns.description: Advanced Driver Assistance System camera update with safety checks
patterns.use_case: Advanced Driver Assistance System camera update with safety checks

CAN bus timeout during reboot - implement watchdog with extended timeout
Safety diagnostic failure - automatic rollback mandatory
Version mismatch - strict version validation required
validation_rules: Battery level must be >= 70% for ASIL-B
patterns.rollback_procedure: ASIL-B requires automatic rollback if any safety check fails. Previous version restored from backup partition. Vehicle enters safe mode until validation.
verification_steps: Write to inactive partition/bank with verification

best_practices: Verify base version before applying patch

Insufficient disk space - clean temp files before update
Boot verification failure - automatic rollback to previous partition
Delta patch corruption - verify checksum before and after application
Base version mismatch - strict base version validation required
validation_rules: Base version must match current version
Lower battery threshold acceptable for delta

common_issues: ECU communication loss - verify all nodes responsive

patterns.name: Brake Control ECU Update - ASIL-C
patterns.description: Safety-critical brake control unit firmware update with ASIL-C compliance
patterns.use_case: Update brake ECU with improved ABS algorithms and safety verification
best_practices: Require 85%+ battery for ASIL-C brake updates
Ensure vehicle is parked with brake engaged
Use dual-bank flash for atomic updates
Keep backup bank intact for 60 days
Validate ABS and brake assist functionality
common_issues: Flash write failure - automatically retry on backup bank
DTC codes present - abort update until cleared
ABS test failure - automatic rollback mandatory
Bank switch failure - fallback to backup bank immediately
Brake fluid low - abort update for safety
validation_rules: battery_level_min must be >= 85 for ASIL-C brake systems
ignition must be off during entire update
no_dtc_codes must be true before starting
signature must use RSA4096 or higher for ASIL-C
encryption must be AES256 minimum for brake systems
patterns.rollback_procedure: ASIL-C requires immediate automatic rollback if any safety check fails. System switches back to backup bank within 50ms. Vehicle enters limp mode with reduced braking power. Manual technician inspection required before retry.
verification_steps: Write to inactive bank with verification
Post-install: Verify boot from new bank

patterns.name: Battery Management ECU Update - ASIL-D
patterns.description: Electric vehicle battery management system update with ASIL-D safety
patterns.use_case: Update BMS firmware with improved thermal management and cell balancing
best_practices: Ensure vehicle is parked and charging
Keep backup bank for extended period
common_issues: Temperature out of range - abort update
Cell imbalance detected - automatic rollback
BMS communication failure - retry with extended timeout
validation_rules: battery_level_min must be >= 95 for BMS updates
signature must use ECDSA_P384 or higher
patterns.rollback_procedure: Immediate rollback if any safety check fails. Vehicle enters reduced power mode. Charging disabled until manual inspection.

patterns.name: Emergency Call System Update - ASIL-B
patterns.description: EU eCall emergency communication system with GDPR compliance
patterns.use_case: Update emergency call system with improved location accuracy and EU compliance
best_practices: Verify LTE and GPS before update
Ensure GDPR compliance for EU region
common_issues: GPS signal loss - run cold start
LTE connection failure - retry with fallback
GDPR validation failure - rollback required
validation_rules: gdpr_compliance_check must pass for EU region
patterns.rollback_procedure: If eCall test fails, automatic rollback within 100ms. System reverts to previous version. Manual validation required.

patterns.name: ADAS Lane Keeping Assist Update - ASIL-B
patterns.description: Lane keeping assist system firmware update with camera calibration
patterns.use_case: Update LKA algorithm with improved lane detection for varying road conditions
best_practices: Test lane detection in various lighting conditions
common_issues: Camera calibration drift - run auto-calibration
Lane detection failure - automatic rollback
Safety diagnostic failure - immediate rollback
validation_rules: camera_calibrated must be true before update
patterns.rollback_procedure: Automatic rollback if lane detection test fails. Previous version restored immediately.

patterns.name: Motor Control ECU Update - ASIL-D
patterns.description: Electric motor control unit firmware update with torque vectoring
patterns.use_case: Update motor ECU with improved efficiency and torque control algorithms
best_practices: Require 90%+ battery for motor ECU updates
Ensure motor is off and cooled
common_issues: Motor temperature high - wait for cooling
Torque control failure - automatic rollback
Efficiency degradation - rollback required
patterns.rollback_procedure: Immediate rollback if motor control test fails. Vehicle enters limp mode. Manual inspection required.

patterns.name: Transmission Control ECU Update - ASIL-D
patterns.description: Transmission control unit firmware update with shift optimization
patterns.use_case: Update TCU with improved shift timing and fuel efficiency
best_practices: Ensure transmission fluid is at proper level
Verify temperature is within normal range
common_issues: Transmission temperature high - abort update
Shift pattern test failure - automatic rollback
Fluid level low - abort for safety
patterns.rollback_procedure: Automatic rollback if shift test fails. Vehicle enters fail-safe mode with fixed gear. Manual inspection required.

patterns.name: Infotainment Update - Global Markets
patterns.description: Multi-region infotainment update with localization support
patterns.use_case: Deploy UI theme and features to all global markets simultaneously
best_practices: Verify sufficient disk space for multi-language packs
Test localization for all supported regions
common_issues: Disk space exhaustion - clean cache before download
Localization loading failure - fallback to English
Network interruption - resume from last chunk
validation_rules: UI must render in all supported languages
patterns.rollback_procedure: If localization fails, rollback to previous version. User can manually trigger rollback via settings.
